ddls:
CREATE TABLE "lenders" (
  "lender_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each lender */,
  "lender_name" TEXT /* Name of the lender */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the lender */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the lender */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the lender */,
  "fax_number" TEXT /* Fax number of the lender */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the lender */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("lender_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "loans" (
  "loan_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each loan */,
  "lender_id" INTEGER /* ID of the lender providing the loan */,
  "borrower_id" INTEGER /* ID of the borrower */,
  "loan_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the loan type */,
  "loan_purpose" TEXT /* Purpose of the loan (e.g., working capital, term loan) */,
  "sanctioned_amount" REAL /* Sanctioned amount of the loan */,
  "outstanding_amount" REAL /* Outstanding amount of the loan */,
  "interest_rate" REAL /* Interest rate of the loan */,
  "loan_tenure" INTEGER /* Tenure of the loan in months */,
  "repayment_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of repayment (e.g., monthly, quarterly) */,
  "collateral_required" INTEGER /* Whether collateral is required for the loan */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("loan_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loans_lender_id FOREIGN KEY ("lender_id") REFERENCES lenders ("lender_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loans_loan_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("loan_type_id") REFERENCES loan_types ("loan_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loans_borrower_id FOREIGN KEY ("borrower_id") REFERENCES borrowers ("borrower_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "borrowers" (
  "borrower_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each borrower */,
  "borrower_name" TEXT /* Name of the borrower */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the borrower */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the borrower */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the borrower */,
  "fax_number" TEXT /* Fax number of the borrower */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the borrower */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry of the borrower */,
  "annual_revenue" REAL /* Annual revenue of the borrower */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("borrower_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "loan_types" (
  "loan_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each loan type */,
  "loan_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the loan type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the loan type */,
  "interest_rate_range" TEXT /* Range of interest rates for the loan type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("loan_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "loan_agreements" (
  "agreement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each loan agreement */,
  "loan_id" INTEGER /* ID of the loan */,
  "agreement_date" TEXT /* Date of the loan agreement */,
  "repayment_schedule" TEXT /* Repayment schedule for the loan */,
  "loan_amount_disbursed" REAL /* Amount of the loan disbursed */,
  "loan_amount_outstanding" REAL /* Amount of the loan outstanding */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("agreement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loan_agreements_loan_id FOREIGN KEY ("loan_id") REFERENCES loans ("loan_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "repayment_schedules" (
  "schedule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each repayment schedule */,
  "agreement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the loan agreement */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date of the payment */,
  "payment_amount" REAL /* Amount of the payment */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Status of the payment (e.g., pending, paid) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("schedule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_repayment_schedules_agreement_id FOREIGN KEY ("agreement_id") REFERENCES loan_agreements ("agreement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "interest_rates" (
  "rate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interest rate */,
  "loan_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the loan type */,
  "interest_rate" REAL /* Interest rate for the loan type */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date from which the interest rate is effective */,
  "expiry_date" TEXT /* Date till which the interest rate is applicable */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interest_rates_loan_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("loan_type_id") REFERENCES loan_types ("loan_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., loan officer, credit analyst) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user (e.g., loan processing, risk management) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "loan_applications" (
  "application_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each loan application */,
  "borrower_id" INTEGER /* ID of the borrower */,
  "loan_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the loan type */,
  "loan_amount_requested" REAL /* Amount of the loan requested */,
  "application_date" TEXT /* Date of the loan application */,
  "application_status" TEXT /* Status of the loan application (e.g., pending, approved, rejected) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("application_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loan_applications_loan_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("loan_type_id") REFERENCES loan_types ("loan_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loan_applications_borrower_id FOREIGN KEY ("borrower_id") REFERENCES borrowers ("borrower_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "credit_scores" (
  "score_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each credit score */,
  "borrower_id" INTEGER /* ID of the borrower */,
  "credit_score" INTEGER /* Credit score of the borrower */,
  "score_date" TEXT /* Date of the credit score */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("score_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_credit_scores_borrower_id FOREIGN KEY ("borrower_id") REFERENCES borrowers ("borrower_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collaterals" (
  "collateral_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collateral */,
  "borrower_id" INTEGER /* ID of the borrower */,
  "collateral_type" TEXT /* Type of collateral (e.g., property, equipment) */,
  "collateral_value" REAL /* Value of the collateral */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collateral_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaterals_borrower_id FOREIGN KEY ("borrower_id") REFERENCES borrowers ("borrower_id")
)
